{
  "claims": [
    "The high-speed rail project in California is projected to cost $128 billion and rising.",
    "The cost of the high-speed rail project has increased nearly 300% from the initial $33 billion estimate provided to voters in 2008.",
    "Only 171 miles of track are currently under construction for the high-speed rail project.",
    "The high-speed rail project is only projected to connect from Bakersfield to Merced instead of the originally planned route from San Francisco to Los Angeles.",
    "The completion of the high-speed rail project is not projected until 2033 at the earliest."
  ]
}
